zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Wilrich於1580年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾時，她的父親Hans Wilrich38歲，母親Mrs. Hans Wilrich19歲。她於1593年與Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger在德國貝也普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1606年7月20日在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Wilrich于1580年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾时，她的父亲Hans Wilrich38岁，母亲Mrs. Hans Wilrich19岁。她于1593年与Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger在德国貝也普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1606年7月20日在德国海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: from an ancient Germanic personal name composed with agil ‘point, edge (of a sword)’+ rīhhi ‘mighty’.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
meanings: A name derived from Mapia, one of the Greek forms of Miriam. Maria is found as a male name as well as a female name. Viscount Montague, of Cowdray, Sussex, who succeeded to the title as second viscount, was christened Anthony Maria Browne. In Camden's Remains (p. 44), referred to in Delicie Literarise, occurs Thomas Maria Wingfield; and there was also a Sir Edward Maria Wingfield. The name appears to have been adopted in the latter family from Mary, daughter of Henry VIII. Compare Notes and Queries 5th S. ii. 73, 316, 478. Marie is frequently found as a male name in France and in other parts of the Continent.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Wilrich was born in 1580, in Kusel, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Hans Wilrich, was 38 and her mother, Mrs. Hans Wilrich, was 19. She married Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger in 1593, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 20 July 1606, in Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Wilrich est née en 1580, à Landkreis Kusel, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Hans Wilrich, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Hans Wilrich, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger en 1593, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1606, à Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Wilrich 1580 in Landkreis Kusel, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hans Wilrich 38 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Hans Wilrich 19. Sie hat 1593 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1606 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Wilrich è nata il nel 1580 nel Landkreis Kusel, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Hans Wilrich, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Hans Wilrich, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger nel 1593, nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1606, nel Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Wilrichが1580年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス クセルで生まれた時，父Hans Wilrichは38歳，母Mrs. Hans Wilrichは19歳であった。1593年にドイツバイエルンプファルズでMagnus Theodor Vogelfengerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1606年7月20日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズズウエイブルuクンで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Wilrich(이)가 1580년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 쿠셀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hans Wilrich(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Hans Wilrich(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1593년 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 7월 20일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Wilrich nasceu em 1580, em Landkreis Kusel, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Wilrich, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Hans Wilrich, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger em 1593, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de julho de 1606, em Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Wilrich родилась в 1580 г. в местности ландкрис кусел, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Hans Wilrich было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Hans Wilrich, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger в 1593 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 июля 1606 г. в местности звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Wilrich nació en 1580, en Landkreis Kusel, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Hans Wilrich, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mrs. Hans Wilrich, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Magnus Theodor Vogelfenger en 1593, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1606, en Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 26 años.
